---
name: Gameplay Feedback 🎮
about: Submit feedback regarding physiological bounds, feel, pacing, and mechanical balance.
title: '[FEEDBACK]: '
labels: gameplay-tuning
assignees: ''
---

## Gameplay System Under Review
Identify the specific prologue stage or mechanic you are providing feedback on:
- [ ] Kid Hanuman movement (double jump, tail grapple)
- [ ] Tyaksha Forest Imp chasing
- [ ] Thermal Ascent (wind updrafts, dissolving clouds)
- [ ] Airavat Elephant Boss Fight
- [ ] Lord Indra Chariot Fight
- [ ] Vajra Nerf & Forgetfulness Transition
- [ ] Other (e.g., Stamina decay rates, Lactic Acid accumulation speeds)

## Physiological & Mechanical Observations
Describe your experience with the game's physiological and physical limits.
- **Biomechanical Feel**: Does the latency (neurological latency), stamina decay, or lactic acid fatigue feel responsive and immersive, or overly restrictive?
- **Physics Tuning**: Did the grapple swing tension constants, cloud platforms' 3-second vaporization timers, or Vayu updraft lift vectors feel natural?

## Proposed Calibration Adjustments
What numerical values or logical thresholds would you suggest modifying to improve balance?
- **Current Metric**: (e.g., "Hanuman's default walk speed under fatigue is 250 units.")
- **Suggested Metric**: (e.g., "Increase to 300 units to avoid making the Ayodhya transition feel sluggish.")
- **Design Rationale**: (Provide scientific, biomechanical, or gameplay immersion justification.)

## Playtest Environment Details
- **Input device used**: [ ] Gamepad (Xbox/PlayStation) [ ] Keyboard & Mouse
- **Average Framerate**: (e.g., 60 FPS, 120 FPS)
- **Diagnostic Run Result**: Did all components pass the `RunMissionDiagnostic()` test suite?
